name: openclaw-watchboard
description: OpenClaw 安全风险监控面板

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run install:shared
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.refresh:skills-db: python3 scripts/setup_database.py && python3 scripts/analyze_clawhub_skills.py && python3 scripts/analyze_csv_skills.py && python3 scripts/fetch_skills_sh_data.py && python3 scripts/fetch_skills_sh_rankings.py && python3 scripts/fetch_gendigital_skills.py --classification safe && python3 scripts/import_external_skills_to_db.py && python3 scripts/generate_statistics.py
scripts.refresh:risks-db:local: python3 scripts/setup_database.py && python3 scripts/analyze_vulnerabilities.py && python3 scripts/import_vulnerabilities_to_db.py
scripts.sync:db:all: npm run sync:db:tencent && npm run sync:db:aliyun
scripts.sync:code:all: npm run sync:code:tencent && npm run sync:code:aliyun
scripts.sync:release:all: npm run sync:release:tencent && npm run sync:release:aliyun
